Tip of the day
Quality outcome will help raise the chances for better quality items seen at the bottom of recipes in the crafting interface.

Rock-star amulet

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Other languages:

Rock-star amulet
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Neck
Value: 52
Keywords: Achievement reward
Amulet
Search
Keyword: 		Mining
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Amulet that is either a star shaped rock or a rock shaped star.

The Rock-star amulet item is a loot item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

Attribute

+5% Find gems While doing Mining.

Ability

   Rock And Roll
Effect Requirements Cooldowns Charges Note
Creates 5 random rough gems. No requirement. 300 actions
While doing Mining.
While doing Mining ores activity.
Have item Rock-star amulet equipped. 		3 This ability makes 5 rolls on the Gem Pouch Table.
You touch the star shaped amulet and it creates a few gems in your palm.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Achievement Completion Reward

Achievement Name Quantity Requirement
Rockstar 1 Mine Ore from Mining ores activities. [10,000]

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.
